creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Obviously, the port *itself* builds fine on 11.4/12.2/13.0/14.0 aarch64/amd64/armv6/armv7/i386. Runtime isn't used but x11-toolkits/gtk{3,4}0 have RUN_DEPENDS on wayland-protocols for some reason (tracking it down is non-trivial due to history cut short by external repos).
